subject: URGENT: Production database is down
body: Our main production database has been unreachable for the past 15 minutes. All customer-facing services are affected. We need immediate action. The error logs show connection timeouts and the failover hasn't kicked in automatically.

subject: Meeting follow-up: Q4 Planning
body: Thanks for the great discussion today. Could you send me the slides and let me know your availability for a follow-up next week? I think we need to finalize the budget allocation before the board meeting.

subject: Quick question about the API
body: Hey! I'm integrating with your API and noticed the /users endpoint returns a 404. Is this expected behavior or am I missing something? The docs say it should return user data.

subject: Invoice #4521 - Payment Reminder
body: This is a friendly reminder that invoice #4521 for $2,500 is due in 3 days. Please process the payment to avoid any late fees. Let us know if you have any questions.

subject: 🎉 You've won a FREE iPhone!
body: CONGRATULATIONS! You've been selected as our lucky winner! Click here to claim your FREE iPhone 15 Pro Max! Limited time offer! Act now or miss out forever!

subject: Team lunch tomorrow?
body: Hey team! Anyone up for lunch tomorrow at that new Italian place downtown? Thinking around 12:30. Let me know if you can make it!

subject: CRITICAL: Security breach detected
body: We've detected unusual login activity from an unrecognized IP address attempting to access the admin panel. Multiple failed attempts in the last hour. Recommend immediate password reset and 2FA enforcement.

subject: Your weekly newsletter
body: This week in tech: AI advances, new startup funding rounds, and the latest framework everyone's talking about. Plus our exclusive interview with industry leaders.

subject: Project deadline extension request
body: Hi, I wanted to discuss the current project timeline. Due to some unexpected technical challenges with the third-party integration, I'm requesting a one-week extension. The core features are complete but testing is taking longer than anticipated.

subject: Feedback on your recent presentation
body: Great job on the presentation yesterday! The board was impressed with the data analysis. I'd like to schedule a follow-up to discuss potential next steps and how we can scale the initiative across other departments.
